response.content:
EXPLANATION:
To improve the document's formatting and ensure proper page breaks, I have added three standard LaTeX packages to the preamble. The `geometry` package is included to set sensible page margins. The `microtype` package is added to improve typography, which results in better spacing and line breaks throughout the document. Finally, `hyperref` is included to make cross-references and URLs clickable, a standard feature for modern papers.

DIFF:
```diff
--- main.tex
+++ main.tex
@@ -1,8 +1,12 @@
 \documentclass{article}
 \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
 \usepackage{amsmath, mathpazo} % Use mathpazo for fancy font
+\usepackage{geometry} % For page layout
+\geometry{a4paper, margin=1in} % Set margins
+\usepackage{microtype} % Improves typography and line breaking
 \usepackage{fancyhdr}
 \usepackage{pgfornament}
 \usepackage{lipsum} % For generating filler text
+\usepackage[colorlinks=true, linkcolor=blue
